headline: U.S. Bank Names Eric Levine to Lead Healthcare Payments
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 23, 2026--Eric Levine has joined U.S. Bank to lead the bank’s strategy to deliver more connected treasury, payments and merchant solutions to healthcare organizations.
